teaching: A controller method that returns a render array (NOT a Response object or raw HTML string) with cache metadata including cache tags (node_list) and cache contexts (user.permissions).
prompt: Write a Drupal page controller method that displays a list of the 10 most recent published articles. The page is visible to any user with the 'access content' permission.
detail: missing all of: ['#cache', "'tags'", "'contexts'"]; php-lint: 1 PHP block(s) pass syntax check
